summary: Exceptional audience recording captures a short, solid set highlighted by Brent’s fresh keyboards and a memorable Other One.
review: The vintage audience tape is praised as exceptional, delivering clear and vivid sound that lets listeners enjoy the tight, meat‑and‑potatoes performance. Reviewers note solid playing throughout, with Brent Mydland’s harmonies standing out and The Other One receiving special atmospheric praise. Overall the show feels like a sweet nugget of a Dead concert.

ai_rating.rationale: Show is described as solid with standout moments (The Other One, Brent’s keyboards) and the recording is called exceptional; weighted average yields a strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the audience (AUD) recording "exceptional," noting crisp, vivid sound that captures ambience well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Short but sweet set; meat‑and‑potatoes selection with solid playing throughout and no major lulls.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil Lesh was seen boogying away on stage right during the early part of the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland is praised for harmonizing really well just months after joining the band.
